jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Miniklub
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Miniklub. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Miniklub:
Miniklub is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Miniklub!
